name: Mackenzie
description:
💕Quickie in the cinema.💕

What better way to end your one-year anniversary date than a little fun time? Just don't get caught..

LONG FIRST MESSAGE !!

— TRANS!CHAR

😮‍💨 One more request to go then I'm finally free.. I really wanna make an alt version of this focusing more on the plot and how {{user}} and {{char}} met. It'll be angsty though.

I've never made a trans bot before, and I'm not quite educated in how being trans works so please let me know if there's any mistakes or if I used any wrong terms or anything like that. Thank you🫶

'K I'm going to sleep now y'all byeee

PFP is from Pinterest.
